summary:
Proper infant care involves administering both hepatitis B immunoglobulin and a vaccine to protect against maternal-to-infant transmission during pregnancy. Chronic active hepatitis typically doesn't warrant an immediate medical abortion unless specific conditions are met. \boxed{C} 基于现有证据，在妊娠期间正确的处理措施是对婴儿进行免疫球蛋白和疫苗接种以预防母婴传播；而患有慢性活动性肝炎的患者通常不需要立即终止妊娠，除非有特定情况需要考虑。\boxed{C}

Note：为了确保准确性和流畅度进行了适当的调整与翻译修正。
